name: background-agent-adapter
description: Pluggable agent adapter layer for background coding agents. Swap coding agents by implementing 13 methods and setting one env var.
author: Alden Myers

scripts.check:python: cd packages/sandbox-runtime && uv run --frozen --extra dev ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run --frozen --extra dev ruff format --check src/ tests/ && uv run --frozen --extra dev mypy src/ && uv run --frozen --extra dev pytest tests/ -v && cd ../modal-infra && uv run --frozen --extra dev ruff check src/ && uv run --frozen --extra dev ruff format --check src/ && uv run --frozen --extra dev mypy src/ && uv run --frozen --extra dev pytest tests/ -v
scripts.check:publish: npm run format:check && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:e2e -w @open-inspect/web && npm run check:python && npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run deploy:server:dry-run && npm run deploy:web:dry-run
scripts.check:publish:live: npm run check:daytona && npm run check:publish
scripts.deploy:server:dry-run: npm run build --workspace @open-inspect/shared && npx wrangler deploy -c packages/server/wrangler.production.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.deploy:server: npm run build --workspace @open-inspect/shared && npx wrangler deploy -c packages/server/wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.deploy:web:dry-run: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-web-wrangler-production.ts && npm --workspace @open-inspect/web run build:cloudflare && npx wrangler deploy --config packages/web/wrangler.production.toml --dry-run
scripts.deploy:web: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-web-wrangler-production.ts && npm --workspace @open-inspect/web run build:cloudflare && npx wrangler deploy --config packages/web/wrangler.production.toml
